name: flutter-migration
description: SwiftUI → Flutter migration for saju-flutter project

members.name: stage4-widgets
members.prompt:
You are implementing Stage 4a of a SwiftUI → Flutter migration. Create ALL reusable widget files for the Flutter project at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-flutter/lib/widgets/.

Read the iOS Swift component files first at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/Components/ to understand exact styling and structure, then write the Flutter Dart equivalents.

## Color references (from AppColors in theme.dart):
- backgroundBase: Color(0xFF0a0f1e)
- surfaceRaised: Color(0xFF0f172a)
- surfaceOverlay: Color(0xFF1e293b)
- textHeading: Color(0xFFfef3c7)
- textSecondary: Color(0xFFcbd5e1)
- textMuted: Color(0xFF94a3b8)
- textFaint: Color(0xFF475569)
- borderDefault: Color(0xFF334155)
- accent: Color(0xFFf59e0b)
- accentLight: Color(0xFFfbbf24)
Import these from: `import 'package:saju_forum/config/theme.dart';`

## FiveElement colors:
- wood: Color(0xFF10b981), fire: Color(0xFFf43f5e), earth: Color(0xFFf59e0b), metal: Color(0xFFe2e8f0), water: Color(0xFF3b82f6)

## Files to create:

### 1. lib/widgets/card_background.dart
Port from CardBackground.swift. A Container widget with:
- BoxDecoration: color surfaceRaised, borderRadius 16, border 1px borderDefault
- Optional borderColor and borderWidth params

### 2. lib/widgets/score_bar.dart
Port from ScoreBar.swift. Row with:
- Label text (width 44), animated progress bar, value text (width 28)
- Bar color: >=80 green(#10b981), >=60 amber(#f59e0b), >=40 rose(#f43f5e), else gray(#64748b)
- Use AnimatedContainer or TweenAnimationBuilder for bar width animation

### 3. lib/widgets/section_header.dart
Port from SectionHeader.swift. Row with:
- Circle icon badge (34x34, color.withOpacity(0.15)) with icon
- Title text (headline bold, textHeading color)

### 4. lib/widgets/form_card.dart
Port from SajuInputView.swift's FormCard. Column with:
- Icon + title header row
- Content child widget
- Card background styling

### 5. lib/widgets/settings_card.dart
Port from ProfileView.swift. Two widgets:
- SettingsCard: icon badge header + content child
- SettingRow: label + value in a horizontal row

### 6. lib/widgets/quick_action_button.dart
Port from HomeView.swift's QuickActionButton. Column with:
- Rounded rect icon container (52x52)
- Label text below
- Card background

### 7. lib/widgets/four_pillars_card.dart
Port from FourPillarsCard.swift. Complex widget:
- Header: tablecells icon + "사주 원국" title
- 4-column Row with PillarColumn widgets
- PillarColumn: label header, stem cell, branch cell
- PillarCell: Korean char (colored by element), hanja, element badge
- Day column (index 2) highlighted with accent color
- Handle null hour pillar with "—" and "시간 미상"
- Import FiveElement from models/enums.dart for color

### 8. lib/widgets/five_elements_chart.dart
Port from FiveElementsChart.swift:
- Header with dominant element badge
- 5 ElementBar rows (wood, fire, earth, metal, water)
- ElementBar: circle dot + korean label + animated bar + count(percentage%)
- Deficit elements info row
- Use LayoutBuilder for bar width calculation
- TweenAnimationBuilder for bar animation

### 9. lib/widgets/hero_banner.dart
Port from HeroBanner.swift:
- Container with purple gradient (#4c1d95 → #312e81)
- Radial gradient overlay
- 🔮 emoji, "청월선생의 사주 풀이" title
- Birth info pill (capsule with birth date/time/gender/calendar)
- borderRadius 16

### 10. lib/widgets/compatibility_ring.dart
Port from CompatibilityRingView.swift:
- CustomPainter for animated circular progress ring
- Background track circle (surfaceOverlay color)
- Filled arc with gradient
- Center: big score number + "점" label
- Ring color: >=80 green, >=60 amber, >=40 rose, else gray
- TweenAnimationBuilder for animation
- Size and lineWidth configurable (default 180, 14)

### 11. lib/widgets/chapter_card.dart
Port from ChapterCard.swift. Two widgets:

ChapterInfo class:
```dart
class ChapterInfo {
  final int index; // 1-based
  final IconData icon;
  final String title;
  final Color accentColor;
  
  static final List<ChapterInfo> all = [
    ChapterInfo(index: 1, icon: Icons.person, title: '총운과 성격', accentColor: Color(0xFFa855f7)),
    ChapterInfo(index: 2, icon: Icons.attach_money, title: '재물운', accentColor: Color(0xFFf59e0b)),
    ChapterInfo(index: 3, icon: Icons.work, title: '직업운', accentColor: Color(0xFF3b82f6)),
    ChapterInfo(index: 4, icon: Icons.favorite, title: '연애운', accentColor: Color(0xFFf43f5e)),
    ChapterInfo(index: 5, icon: Icons.eco, title: '건강운', accentColor: Color(0xFF10b981)),
  ];
}
```

ChapterCard: header (icon badge + "Chapter N" + title + streaming indicator), divider, content or skeleton shimmer, blinking cursor when streaming.

ClosingCard: 🙏 emoji, completion message, gradient background (#1e1b4b → #0f172a).

### 12. lib/widgets/loading_error_views.dart
Common widgets used across result screens:
- LoadingView(message, emoji, glowColor): radial gradient orb + emoji + message + CircularProgressIndicator
- ErrorView(message, onRetry): error icon + message + retry button

Write ALL files now. Use proper Flutter widget patterns (StatelessWidget or StatefulWidget as needed). Import AppColors from theme.dart for colors.

members.name: stage3-providers
stage4-screens
members.prompt:
You are implementing Stage 4b of a SwiftUI → Flutter migration. Create ALL feature screen files for the Flutter project at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-flutter/lib/features/.

Read the iOS Swift view files first at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/Features/ to understand exact UI structure, then write Flutter Dart equivalents.

## Color constants (use AppColors from theme.dart):
```dart
import 'package:saju_forum/config/theme.dart';
// AppColors.backgroundBase, AppColors.surfaceRaised, AppColors.textHeading, etc.
// AppColors.accent, AppColors.accentLight, etc.
```

## Files to create:

### 1. lib/features/auth/login_screen.dart
Port from LoginView.swift. Scaffold with:
- Background: AppColors.backgroundBase
- Hero section: 🔮 in circle, "사주포럼" title, subtitle, feature rows (sparkles/heart/calendar icons)
- Feature row card with surfaceRaised background
- Bottom: ChatGPT login button (accent background, dark text), loading state, "둘러보기" underlined button
- Error alert dialog
- Use ref.read(authStateProvider.notifier) for login action
- Use ref.read(isBrowsingProvider.notifier).state = true for browse action

### 2. lib/features/onboarding/onboarding_screen.dart
Port from OnboardingView.swift. Scaffold + SingleChildScrollView:
- Header: "온보딩" title + subtitle
- Name TextField
- Gender toggle buttons (남/여)
- CalendarType toggle (양력/음력), leap month switch when lunar
- Birth date: 3 CupertinoPickers (year 1930-2025, month 1-12, day 1-31)
- Optional birth hour: toggle + CupertinoPicker (0-23시)
- Relationship status chips (horizontal scroll)
- 완료 button (disabled when name empty)
- On complete: save profile via profileProvider, navigate to home

### 3. lib/features/main_tab/main_tab_screen.dart
Port from MainTabView.swift:
- Takes StatefulNavigationShell from GoRouter
- BottomNavigationBar with 5 tabs: 홈(home), 사주(sparkles/auto_awesome), 궁합(heart/favorite), 운세(sunny/wb_sunny), 프로필(person)
- Dark tab bar styling (surfaceRaised background)
- Use navigationShell.goBranch(index) for tab switching

### 4. lib/features/home/home_screen.dart
Port from HomeView.swift. Scaffold + ScrollView:
- Greeting header: "안녕하세요, {name}님", today's date, 🔮 icon
- If no profile: noProfileCard
- If loading: fortune loading card with ProgressIndicator
- If fortune loaded: fortuneSummaryCard (header, score bars, lucky info row)
- Quick actions section: 3 QuickActionButtons
- Load fortune on init via API
- Use ref.watch(profileProvider) for user data

### 5. lib/features/saju/saju_input_screen.dart
Port from SajuInputView.swift. Scaffold + ScrollView:
- "내 정보 불러오기" button (if profile exists)
- FormCard: birth date (3 wheel pickers)
- FormCard: calendar type toggle
- FormCard: leap month toggle (when lunar)
- FormCard: birth time (unknown toggle + hour/minute pickers)
- FormCard: gender toggle (male=blue, female=pink)
- Analyze button with gradient (accent → accentLight)
- Navigate to /saju/result with SajuRequest

### 6. lib/features/saju/saju_result_screen.dart
Port from SajuResultView.swift. The most complex screen:
- Loading phase: LoadingView with 🔮 emoji
- Error phase: ErrorView with retry
- Streaming/Done phase: ScrollView with:
  - HeroBanner (meta info)
  - FourPillarsCard
  - FiveElementsChart
  - 5 ChapterCards (appear progressively as streaming advances)
  - ClosingCard (when all done)
- Use sajuProvider for state management
- AnimatedSwitcher/AnimatedOpacity for card transitions

### 7. lib/features/gunghap/gunghap_input_screen.dart
Port from GunghapInputView.swift:
- PersonFormCard for person A (amber accent) with "내 정보 불러오기"
- Heart divider (❤️ between two lines)
- PersonFormCard for person B (rose accent)
- PersonFormCard includes: name field, birth date pickers, birth hour toggle+picker, gender toggle
- Analyze button with amber→rose gradient (disabled when names empty)
- Navigate to /gunghap/result

### 8. lib/features/gunghap/gunghap_result_screen.dart
Port from GunghapResultView.swift:
- Loading: LoadingView with 💕 emoji
- Error: ErrorView with retry
- Result: ScrollView with:
  - Name pair header (avatar circles + names + heart)
  - CompatibilityRing card
  - Category scores card (ScoreBars)
  - Element harmony card (dominant element badges + description)
  - AI interpretation card (streaming text + cursor)
- Use gunghapProvider

### 9. lib/features/fortune/daily_fortune_screen.dart
Port from DailyFortuneView.swift:
- No profile: message to set up profile first
- Loading: LoadingView with ☀️ emoji
- Error: ErrorView with retry
- Fortune: ScrollView with:
  - Date header card
  - Day pillar card (hanja characters)
  - Score bars card
  - Lucky info card (color circle, number, direction)
  - AI interpretation card (streaming text)
- Use fortuneProvider

### 10. lib/features/profile/profile_screen.dart
Port from ProfileView.swift:
- No profile: message + "프로필 설정하기" button
- Has profile: ScrollView with:
  - Avatar section (initial circle + name + birth date + edit button)
  - Basic info SettingsCard (birth date, time, gender, calendar, relationship)
  - Account SettingsCard (email, quota, logout button / login button)
  - App info SettingsCard (version 2.0.0)
  - Danger zone: "프로필 초기화" button (red) with confirmation dialog
- Logout/clear confirmation dialogs

IMPORTANT:
- Use ConsumerWidget or ConsumerStatefulWidget (Riverpod)
- Import widgets from widgets/ directory
- Import providers from providers/ directory  
- Import models from models/ directory
- Use AppColors from config/theme.dart for all colors
- CupertinoPicker for date/time selection (iOS-like wheel picker)
- All text in Korean matching the iOS original

Write ALL files now.
